title: U.S. Home Safety Data by ZIP Code
description: U.S. home safety data for 42,000+ residential ZIP codes across 17 risk verticals — water quality (EPA SDWIS/LCR/UCMR5), radon, lead, PFAS, flood (FEMA NFIP), wildfire/earthquake (FEMA NRI), air toxics (EPA NATA), product recalls (CPSC), energy rebates, housing data (Census ACS), and more. Aggregated from 50+ federal and state sources. Updated weekly from zipcheckup.com.
